goal: Predict bulk_modulus, density, tg for PVNL (*CC(Cl)*)
assumptions: PVNL (medium confidence) class defaults are a validated scaffold but tunable; two documented PVC2 failures are addressed by reasoned overrides (see revision_notes).
PVC member disambiguated from the PVNL class dict by the *CC(Cl)* substituent: exp Tg=354 K, exp RT density=1.38 g/cm3, exp K_T=3.5-4.5 GPa (glassy, 25 C).
PVC is physically glassy at 300 K (Tg 354 >> 300): mechanical K via glassy Murnaghan at 300 K; is_glassy confirmed by measured Tg from the thermal track.

revision_notes.PVC2_failure_1_degenerate_tg: PVC2 Tg fit was degenerate across all rates. Root cause (PVC2 run_log): retired [40,160,400] K/ns rate set gave 500/125/50 ps per-T holds (two fast rates degenerate by construction, transition_width c~0 kink artifacts) AND the melt/rubbery state was under-equilibrated before cooling (end-to-end tau_relax ~17.6 ns >> trajectory). FIX: (a) adopt the validated [25,50,100] K/ns set (800/400/200 ps per-T, all clear the 200 ps floor); (b) lengthen melt equilibration t_equil_ns 5->8 ns and eq_annealing_cycles 5->7 to relax chains via the high-T anneal, which is the policy-sanctioned substitute for unattainable melt self-diffusion at DP=60 (require_glassy rationale).
revision_notes.PVC2_failure_2_bm_b0prime_high: PVC2 Murnaghan at +/-1000 atm (+/-0.1 GPa) gave B0'=16.34 (unphysical; glassy PVC should be 4-10), K=2.91 GPa vs exp ~4.0 (-27%). A narrow pressure span under-constrains the EOS curvature, letting B0' float high. FIX: widen bm_pressures_atm to +/-3000 atm (+/-0.3 GPa) to sample enough P-V curvature to constrain B0' into [4,20] while staying in the linear-elastic glassy regime (strain well below yield).
revision_notes.bm_span_recovery_R04: BM-span recovery R-04 (2026-06-24): bm_pressures_atm [-3000, -1500, 0, 1500, 3000] -> [-1000, 0, 1500, 3000, 5000]. The -3000 atm (and likely -1500) tension cavitated the glassy PVC cell (density collapse 1.3->0.002 g/cm3, T runaway to 3655 K, 'Non-numeric pressure - simulation unstable' at bm_P-3000). Switched to a compression-biased span: tension capped at -1000 atm (PVC2-proven stable), compression extended to +5000 atm to retain the wide 6000-atm range that constrains B0'. Orchestrator inline recovery.

uncertainties.name: tg_chain_equilibration
uncertainties.note: Dominant carry-over risk from PVC2: at DP=60 melt self-diffusion is unattainable (tau_relax ~3.6e9 ps), so chain relaxation before cooling relies entirely on the high-T anneal. Mitigated here by t_equil_ns 5->8 ns and eq_annealing_cycles 5->7 plus the corrected [25,50,100] rate set. A small-cell NPT density screen vs 1.38 g/cm3 would cheaply confirm packing/FF transferability before the full thermal sweep. Recorded as planned, not executed; Validator decides.

uncertainties.name: bm_b0_prime_constraint
uncertainties.note: PVC2 B0'=16.34 was unphysical at +/-1000 atm. Widening to +/-3000 atm is the planned remedy; if B0' still falls outside [4,20] the Murnaghan->deform fallback (D-07) engages. No cheaper probe than the run itself.

uncertainties.name: ff_transferability
uncertainties.note: PCFF for PVC: Cl partial charges on backbone carbons make density/Tg sensitive to PPPM + charge embedding. EMC/PCFF build-tested PASS for PVC but no class-specific MD Tg paper. Same probe as tg_chain_equilibration (one density screen covers both).

uncertainties.name: hardware_optimum
uncertainties.note: hardware_policy.values_are_benchmarked=false AND directional_probe host (4x A800/32 cores, 2026-06-21) != live host (4x Quadro RTX 6000/18 cores). by_forcefield[pcff] default kept (no D-08 override); a hardware_benchmark probe on the built cell would clean-benchmark this host.

evidence.claim: RadonPy/GAFF2_mod path replaced by EMC/PCFF (build-tested: PVC PASS, PVAc PASS, PVA PASS). Note: OPLS-AA failed for PVC and PVAc; PCFF succeeded.

PCFF embeds charges via bond increments; no separate QM charge job. PVC Cl gives significant backbone-carbon partial charges, but these are carried by the PCFF increment table (EMC charge_method=none), consistent with the chosen FF. On the retired RadonPy route AM1-BCC was adequate for polar vinyl side chains without aromatic conjugation (RESP not required).

PVC backbone C-Cl gives |q|>0.1e partial charges on backbone carbons, so long-range Coulomb via PPPM is required; neglecting it biases density/Tg 5-20% for polar polymers. Heteroatom (Cl) present -> pppm mandated by policy.
evidence.source: decision_policy.json:policies.electrostatics.require; polymer_rules.json:electrostatics_decision_guide; PVNL.notes (PVC chloride gives significant partial charges, PPPM required)

evidence.claim: DP=60 is well above the Fox-Flory plateau (DP>=20) required for Tg, and above PVNL dp_min=30 for bulk_modulus finite-size convergence. PVC monomer (-CH2-CHCl-) = 6 all-atom atoms; 6 x 60 x 10 = ~3600 atoms (matches PVC2's measured 3620) — large enough to avoid self-imaging at the 12 A cutoff while staying within GPU budget.
experimental comparators pinned to the PVC member (not the PVNL class dict) by the *CC(Cl)* substituent.

decisions.choice: require_glassy (DP>=30 glassy gate); melt equilibration lengthened (t_equil_ns 5->8, eq_annealing_cycles 5->7)

evidence.claim: At DP=60 melt chain self-diffusion is unattainable on MD timescales (measured tau_relax ~3.6e9 ps for DP=60 PVC; PVC2 saw end-to-end tau_relax ~17.6 ns >> trajectory), so overall_pass via C(t) decay is unsatisfiable by construction. Gate on density plateau within experimental range + homogeneity CV<0.25 + P2 nematic<0.10 + energy drift/SEM bounds; diffusion metrics advisory. The high-T anneal substitutes for melt self-diffusion. PVC2 under-relaxed the melt before cooling; to strengthen the substitute, t_equil_ns is raised 5->8 ns and eq_annealing_cycles 5->7 (610 K anneal).

decisions.choice: stepwise-cooling multirate [25,50,100] K/ns, T_STEP=20K, sweep 150-550 K; replaces PVC2 retired [40,160,400]

evidence.claim: PVC2 used the retired [40,160,400] K/ns set: at T_STEP=20K this gives 500/125/50 ps per-T holds, so the two fast rates were degenerate by construction (rate is the same knob as per-T sampling), producing transition_width c~0 kink artifacts and an unreliable fit. The validated [25,50,100] set gives 800/400/200 ps (800k/400k/200k steps at dt=1fs), every rate clearing the 200 ps tg_min_steps_per_T floor. Sweep 150-550 K brackets exp Tg=354 K (and the expected MD overestimate of 380-470 K) with >100 K margin below and >150 K above per Patrone2016. Log-linear Tg(G)=a+b*ln(G) extrapolated to dsc_equiv_rate 1.6667e-10 K/ns.

alternatives.rejected_reason: RETIRED: 500/125/50 ps per-T at T_STEP=20K; two fast rates degenerate; caused PVC2 degenerate Tg fit.

decisions.choice: Glassy Murnaghan NPT compression at 300 K, bm_pressures_atm widened to +/-3000 atm; deform fallback

evidence.claim: PVC is glassy at 300 K (exp Tg=354 > 300), so K via Murnaghan NPT compression at 300 K (symmetric, cell-size independent; Wu 2019 validated). Born+NVT REMOVED pipeline-wide (PCFF+PPPM virial incompatibility, K_Born 8-15x too high, failed 3/3 incl. PVC1, 2026-06-21). PVC2 at +/-1000 atm gave B0'=16.34 (unphysical) and K=2.91 GPa (-27% vs exp 4.0): the narrow span under-constrained EOS curvature. Widening to +/-3000 atm (+/-0.3 GPa) samples more P-V curvature to pin B0' into [4,20] while strain stays well below glassy yield. 3-direction uniaxial deform is the fallback if fit_converged=False or B0' outside [4,20].
evidence.citation: decision_policy.json:policies.property_method; polymer_rules.json PVNL exp_K_GPa[3.5,4.5]; BORN_MATRIX.md; PVC2 run_log B0'=16.34 root-cause

alternatives.rejected_reason: Retired 2026-06-21: PCFF+PPPM virial incompatibility, failed 3/3 pipeline runs (PMMA4/PVC1/PEEK1).
PVC2 span too narrow: B0'=16.34 (unphysical), K -27% vs exp. Widened to +/-3000 atm.

evidence.claim: FF family pcff (class2+PPPM) -> KOKKOS full-offload, mpi=1 canonical (kspace on GPU). Estimated cell ~3600 atoms is <10k -> force 1 GPU (no multi-GPU pin). This equals by_forcefield[pcff] default {engine:kokkos, mpi:1, gpu_per_run:1}, so NO decided_params hardware override is written (worker prompt stays identical to the policy path). directional_probe (pcff gpu1_mpi1 42.83 ns/day, cell 3020 atoms) is in-size (~3600 within [0.5x,2x] of 3020) BUT values_are_benchmarked=false AND directional_probe host (4x A800/32 cores, 2026-06-21) != live host (4x Quadro RTX 6000/18 cores), so the absolute throughput is a HINT only and confidence is low. All GPUs currently busy; orchestrator claims a free GPU at submit (1 GPU).
evidence.source: polymer_rules.json:hardware_policy.by_forcefield.pcff; directional_probe.recommended_by_ff.pcff (42.826 ns/day, measured_on 4x A800/32 cores, 2026-06-21, values_are_benchmarked=false)

alternatives.rejected_reason: PCFF fallback only; KOKKOS full-offload is ~7.9x faster at mpi=1 and frees cores for ~4 concurrent runs (1/GPU).

findings: Gate verified: PVNL confidence=medium -> reasoned mode matches plan_mode (no bypass).

All reasoned policies (D-01..D-07) cover their evaluate criteria; evidence_required decisions (D-01,D-03,D-07) cite DOI/citation; empty alternatives on D-01 (PCFF only EMC FF that builds PVC) and D-03 (lj_cut excluded by heteroatom require) are explicitly justified.

Require clauses satisfied: pppm for Cl heteroatom backbone (D-03); require_glassy gate for DP=60 glassy (D-05); glassy Murnaghan 300K with deform fallback, Born+NVT excluded (D-07); all tg_rates [25,50,100] clear the 200ps/200000-step floor at T_STEP=20K (800/400/200 ps).
PVC2 root causes addressed: degenerate Tg fixed via validated rate set + longer melt anneal (t_equil 5->8 ns, cycles 5->7); unphysical B0'=16.34 fixed by widening bm_pressures to +/-3000 atm.
Stage schema clean: all stages carry stage/track/success_criteria; tracks valid; every stage->track pairing matches track_map; planned_stages cover all requested properties (density/tg/bulk_modulus).

D-08 hardware: decided_params unpinned (policy-derived, safe); recorded decision equals by_forcefield[pcff] default {kokkos,mpi:1,gpu:1}; mpi=1 canonical for PCFF/KOKKOS (kspace on GPU, not anti-pattern); <10k-atom cell -> 1 GPU; no non-default pin so staleness/host-mismatch rules not triggered; confidence:low appropriate.
